§7Guide Book #50§r
§lOak Tree Guardian§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Neutral
•§lMob type§r: Tree Guardian, Treant, Nature-elemental, Magical.
•§lSpawns in§r: Forest, Flower Forest, Birch Forest, Dark Forest,

Taiga, Jungle, Swamp, Mangrove Swamp, Cherry Grove, Mossy Forest, Overgrown Jungle.
•§lHealth§r: 50
•§lKnockback resistance§r: 1.1
•§lWalk speed§r: 0.2
•§lBreathes in§r: Air, Water
•§lHealed by§r: Bone Meal

•§lPossible drops§r: Oak Log, Oak Leaves, Oak Sapling, XP Orbs.
•§lAggressive toward§r: Cursed Flying Book, Illagers, Ravager, Vex.

•Can be aggressive towards players if they break any type of log, wood,

§lDescription§r:
 
§‘The Oak Tree Guardian is a neutral, nature-bound sentinel that roams lush and overgrown biomes, protecting the forest with quiet strength. With bark-like skin and a deep connection to the land, it remains peaceful—unless

§’provoked by those who harm trees nearby. Healed by bone meal and resilient to knockback, it stands firm against dark forces like Illagers and Vexes. Defeating one may reward players with oak-themed resources, but beware—its wrath is rooted in
